fault_hypothesis: The overlap detection logic on line 61 is incorrect for boundary conditions. It treats slots that merely touch at their boundaries as non-overlapping, whereas the specification requires them to conflict.

constraints.intent: The non-overlap condition should use strict inequalities, so that touching boundaries are considered overlaps.
After checking an existing slot, the candidate must not be touching its boundary.

spec.expr: all(not (s[1] == candidate[0] or s[0] == candidate[1]) for s in existing)

constraints.intent: If the loop finishes without finding a conflict, the candidate must truly not touch any existing slot.

spec.expr: (__cbfl_result[0] == False) or all((__cbfl_result[1][i][1] < __cbfl_result[1][i+1][0]) for i in range(len(__cbfl_result[1]) - 1))

constraints.intent: If a reservation is successful, the returned schedule must not contain any overlapping or touching slots.
